issue_title: Adding new ICS calendars is impossible in version 0.9.0
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**

In seetings I select an ics calendar.  I get the popup and pick my color.  There is then a line to enter the ics url.  I try to paste into the URL and it doesn't work.  Also can't type into the fields.

**To Reproduce**
See above

**Expected behavior**
I should be able
test_description_zh: 在设置页面中，选择添加一个新的 ICS 日历，在弹出的配置窗口中选择颜色后，尝试在 URL 输入框中粘贴或手动输入 ICS 地址，观察输入框是否能正常接收输入内容。
expected_result_zh: URL 输入框应能正常接收键盘输入和粘贴操作，用户可以成功填写 ICS 日历的 URL 地址并完成新 ICS 日历的添加。
